name: Standard Threat Response
description: Balanced threat response thresholds. Gives attackers a few chances before escalating, but quickly blocks persistent threats. Recommended for most deployments.
author: Ghostwire Proxy

thresholds.name: Warn after initial detections
thresholds.notes: After 3 threat events in 10 minutes, start returning 429 warnings.

thresholds.name: Temp block repeat offenders
thresholds.notes: After 10 events in 30 minutes or threat score 50, block for 1 hour.

thresholds.name: Permanent block persistent threats
thresholds.notes: After 25 events in 24 hours or threat score 150, permanently block.

thresholds.name: Firewall ban severe threats
thresholds.notes: After 50 events or threat score 300, push to external firewall for network-level ban.
